step.name: audit
step.action: Scan the codebase for hardcoded user-facing strings. Check UI components, error messages, validation messages, email templates, and CLI output. Record the count and locations.
step.output: String audit table: file path, line, string, context.

step.name: select-library
step.action: Based on the project stack (detected from package.json, pubspec.yaml, go.mod, etc.), recommend an i18n library. Load knowledge fragment: patterns/internationalization.md.

step.name: configure-locales
step.action: Create locale resource directory structure and base locale files. Set up the default locale (en) and any target locales specified in inputs.
step.output: Directory structure and base resource files created.

step.name: extract-strings
step.action: Extract audited strings into the locale resource format chosen in step 2. Use ICU message format for any strings with plurals, numbers, or dates.
step.output: Populated resource bundles for the default locale.

step.name: ci-validation
step.action: Document a CI step that validates locale file completeness — every key in the default locale must exist in all target locales. Missing keys fail the build.
step.output: CI validation configuration documented in the report.
